internal_storage_range_length_invalid: Internal storage range length must be greater than zero
internal_storage_range_empty_object: Cannot read a byte range from an empty internal storage object
internal_storage_range_offset_out_of_bou: Internal storage range offset is outside the object bounds
internal_storage_range_header_invalid: Internal storage range header is invalid
internal_storage_range_multiple_unsuppor: Multiple internal storage ranges are not supported
internal_storage_range_bounds_invalid: Internal storage range bounds are invalid
internal_storage_content_length_required: Internal storage request must include a content length
internal_storage_content_length_invalid: Internal storage content length is invalid
internal_storage_compose_parts_required: Internal storage compose request must include at least one part
internal_storage_compose_expected_size_i: Internal storage compose expected size is invalid
